channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Stellar Blade's slick-looking sequel is officially called Blood Rain
item.description: It's raining blood, hallelujah.

item.title: How much data does your favorite messaging app collect? New study shows 90% of messaging apps now include AI that puts privacy at risk
item.description: Are your private chats truly secure? New research from Surfshark dives into the most popular messaging apps, revealing alarming data harvesting and AI privacy risks. See why Signal came out on top.

item.title: Super Yooka-Laylee Kart looks like an old-school Mario Kart for the modern age
item.description: Playtonic is shifting the Yooka-Laylee series from platforming to familiar-looking arcade racing.

item.title: One year ago, Ukraine launched Operation Spiderweb to destroy billions of dollars worth of Russian combat planes – It 'served as a warning to the United States'
item.description: A landmark Ukrainian drone strike in June 2025 destroyed or damaged up to 41 Russian strategic aircraft, cementing the role of drones in the modern battlefield.

item.title: Party with your grandma and prevent her murder in Apple Crumble, out this year
item.description: Duck Detective studio Happy Broccoli is back with a creepy-cute mystery called Apple Crumble.

item.title: '5D' platformer Screenbound arrives on September 10
item.description: Screenbound lets you control a 2D handheld game and a character in a 3D world at the same time.

item.title: Ithaca is a mysterious road-trip RPG from Bury Me, My Love studio Pixel Hunt
item.description: Ithaca asks how far will players go to save the planet.

item.title: Final Fantasy 7 Revelation let's you jump out of an airship Fortnite style
item.description: Square Enix has officially announced Final Fantasy 7 Revelation, the third and final installment in the remake series, launching in Spring 2027.

item.title: In co-op shooter Lazy River, peeing in the pool turns guests into zombies
item.description: Peeing in the pool is extra dangerous in co-op shooter Lazy River.

item.title: More than a decade later, the team behind N++ is back with a multiplayer sequel
item.description: Back in 2015, the two-person studio Metanet released N++, a brutally hard 2D platformer that was a decade in the making, building off of previous releases dating back to the freeware Flash title N. At the time, cofounder Raigan Burns issued some famous last words: "We hope it's not another 10 years before we come […]

item.title: ‘Our hardware is designed to be picked up and shaken about’: Aquark Technologies takes quantum sensing outside of the lab as a viable GNSS alternative
item.description: Aquark Technologies is making quantum sensing portable – cold-atom hardware will offer high-precision, resilient alternatives to vulnerable GNSS.

item.title: N PLUS INFINITY TIMES TWO threatens to revitalize 2D platforming in 2027
item.description: Metanet is bringing minimalism and precise mechanics to consoles and PC next year.

item.title: Tenebris Somnia adds live-action horror to a retro survival game on October 16
item.description: Airdorf and Andrés Borghi are making one nightmare with two styles of terror.

item.title: Final Fantasy 7 Revelation will launch across all platforms in Spring 2027
item.description: The final chapter will drop simultaneously on PS5, Switch 2, Xbox and PC.

item.title: We've called Shokz OpenRun Pro 2 'the best headphones for runners', and this 25% EOFY discount has arrived just in time for marathon season
item.description: These bone conduction headphones have hit a new low price of AU$239 in Amazon’s Mid-Year Sale, and have even made it to the retailer’s bestseller list.

item.title: If Vampire Survivors and Spelunky had a baby, it'd be Messhof's Blood Dungeon
item.description: Blood Dungeon is the latest project from the studio behind Nidhogg.

item.title: Grand Theft Auto VI is warping the video game release calendar
item.description: Who's afraid of the next GTA? Based on the last few days of Summer Game Fest, just about everyone. Grand Theft Auto VI hasn't been present at any of the keynote events, but its presence was felt every time a release date was announced. The month of November, when GTA VI launches, is virtually empty. […]

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Saturday, June 6 (game #1594)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Saturday, June 6 (game #825)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Saturday, June 6 (game #1091)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: You can watch the Among Us animated series right now
item.description: You can watch all ten episodes of the Among Us cartoon on Paramount+.

item.title: The Among Us TV show is better than it has any right to be
item.description: "Among Us," now streaming on Paramount+, is a ridiculously fun adaptation of the hit social deduction video game. Review.

item.title: Among Us TV show gets a surprise drop on Paramount+
item.description: The animated "Among Us" show finally has an update: It's out now on Paramount+.

item.title: Facebook et Instagram | Est-ce que l’abonnement payant vaut la peine ?
item.description: Du nouveau pour les réseaux sociaux Facebook et Instagram : depuis jeudi, l’expérience « Plus » propose aux utilisateurs des fonctionnalités supplémentaires, moyennant une mensualité. Des experts consultés par La Presse vous recommandent d’attendre un peu avant de sortir votre carte de crédit.

item.title: Best Running Shoes, Tested and Reviewed (2026): Saucony, Adidas, Hoka
item.description: We logged thousands of test miles to bring you the best running shoes for every pace, ability, and running goal.

item.title: Saw: Genesis is a 3-on-1 survival game starring the Jigsaw Killer's predecessor
item.description: Bloober Team is publishing (and also kinda helping develop) a new Saw game.

item.title: Microsoft AI chief says company was “set free” from OpenAI to pursue superintelligence
item.description: For three years, Microsoft's artificial intelligence story has been inseparable from OpenAI. The partnership — cemented by a cumulative investment exceeding $13 billion — gave Microsoft early access to the most advanced AI models on the planet, catapulting its Copilot products into the enterprise mainstream and adding hundreds of billions of dollars to its market capitalization. To the outside world, Microsoft's AI strategy was OpenAI.Mustafa Suleyman wants to change that narrative.In an exclusive sit-down interview with VentureBeat at Microsoft Build 2026, the CEO of Microsoft AI disclosed th...

item.title: Final Fantasy VII’s remake trilogy will conclude with Revelation
item.description: Square Enix has officially announced the third and final game in its Final Fantasy VII remake trilogy: Final Fantasy VII Revelation. It will release on multiple platforms simultaneously - PC, PS5, Xbox Series X / S, and Nintendo Switch 2 - in spring 2027. In footage shown onstage at Summer Game Fest Live, there was […]

item.title: Virtua Fighter Crossroads is coming in 2027
item.description: More details on the sixth Virtua Fighter game are coming in a dedicated showcase stream.

item.title: Reid Hoffman is leaving Microsoft’s board to go ‘founder mode’ with startup Manus
item.description: After a very profitable decade on Microsoft's board, Reid Hoffman is stepping down to focus on his AI drug discovery startup Manus.
